description: Explicit 'build a data dictionary' request with file should activate skill
input: Build a data dictionary for this CSV.

description: Phrase 'document my data' should activate skill
input: Can you document my data? Schema attached.

description: 'Analyze this CSV' should NOT activate data-dictionary skill
input: Analyze this CSV and tell me what's interesting.

description: 'Clean this data' should NOT activate data-dictionary skill
input: Clean this data for me — remove duplicates and fix the dates.

description: No row should have an empty notes cell (blank between pipes)
input: Build a data dictionary for this CSV.

description: Known typo in status column should produce an 'Inferred' flag
input: Build a data dictionary for this CSV.

description: Integer column contaminated with 'N/A' should be typed text and noted
input: Build a data dictionary for this CSV.

description: Numeric field with nulls should distinguish null from zero in notes
input: Build a data dictionary for this CSV.

description: No label should equal field_name verbatim (case-insensitive, underscore-normalized)
input: Build a data dictionary for this CSV.

assertions.name: label_not_equal_fieldname
assertions.description: For every table row matching dictionary schema, label.lower().replace(' ','_') != field_name.lower()

description: Labels should not be generic placeholders
input: Build a data dictionary for this CSV.

description: Labels should be specific enough to distinguish fields (minimum length check as a proxy)
input: Build a data dictionary for this CSV.

assertions.name: min_label_length
assertions.description: Every label cell >= 10 characters (proxy for specificity)

description: ≤15 fields should produce inline markdown table, no xlsx
input: Build a data dictionary for this CSV.

description: 16–50 fields should produce inline table AND offer xlsx
input: Build a data dictionary for this file.

description: 51+ fields should produce xlsx artifact, not a full inline table
input: Build a data dictionary for this file.

assertions.name: no_full_inline_table
assertions.description: Response contains fewer than 20 table rows matching the dictionary schema (a partial preview is OK; a full 60-row dump is not)

description: Files >50k rows should explicitly state sample size at top of output
input: Build a data dictionary for this CSV.
